name: php-resolver
description: Resolves most of your PHP problems - imports, expands and collapses php namespaces, monitors your PHP error log, uses PHP beautifier and PHP sniffer
author: Stoil Dobreff <sdobreff@gmail.com>
versionChanges: Added built-in Go to Definition with cached indexing, definition trace output, cache reset command, module toggles for definition/docblock, and ZIP/docblock improvements.
newVersion: Thank you for installing the PHP Resolver extension. Click OK if you want to check out the repository.

scripts.test: node test/phase1/index.test.js && node test/phase2/regression.test.js && node test/phase3/phase3.test.js

phpResolver.exclude.description: Exclude glob pattern while finding files

phpResolver.definitionIncludeVendor.description: Include vendor directory when building PHP definition index

phpResolver.enableDefinitionModule.description: Enable or disable PHP Resolver Go to Definition module (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableReferencesModule.description: Enable or disable References provider module (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableWorkspaceSymbolsModule.description: Enable or disable Workspace Symbols provider module (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableHoverModule.description: Enable or disable Hover provider module (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableRenameModule.description: Enable or disable safe Rename Symbol provider module (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableImplementationModule.description: Enable or disable Go to Implementation provider module (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableMissingUseModule.description: Enable or disable Auto Import / Fix Missing Use code actions module (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableCallHierarchyModule.description: Enable or disable Call Hierarchy provider for PHP functions and methods (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableWordPressHookModule.description: Enable or disable WordPress Hook Navigator — jump between add_action/do_action and add_filter/apply_filters (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableIndexHealthModule.description: Enable or disable Index Health status bar indicator and report command (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableWorkspaceDiagnosticsMo.description: Enable or disable workspace-wide diagnostics for duplicate declarations and unresolved parents (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableTypeHierarchyModule.description: Enable or disable Type Hierarchy provider for navigating class inheritance (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableDeadCodeModule.description: Enable or disable Dead Code detection — highlights classes/functions with zero references (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableDocumentSymbolModule.description: Enable or disable Document Symbols (Outline view) for PHP classes, methods, properties, and constants (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableInlayHintsModule.description: Enable or disable Inlay Hints showing parameter names at call sites (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableUnusedImportModule.description: Enable or disable unused import (use statement) detection and removal (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableNamespaceCompletionMod.description: Enable or disable namespace/class name completion in use statements and type positions (requires window reload)

phpResolver.enableDocInheritanceModule.description: Enable or disable inherited PHPDoc display on hover for methods without their own docblock (requires window reload)

phpResolver.definitionSingleResult.description: Return only the top-ranked definition result to keep Peek/hover definitions deterministic

phpResolver.definitionDeprioritizeNoopFi.description: Lower ranking for noop.php-like files when resolving definitions

phpResolver.definitionUsePersistentCache.description: Persist PHP definition index cache across restarts for faster startup

phpResolver.definitionTrace.description: Write Go to Definition resolution trace to PHP Resolver output channel

phpResolver.showMessageOnStatusBar.description: Show message on status bar instead of notification box

phpResolver.sortOnSave.description: Auto sort when a file is saved

phpResolver.sortAlphabetically.description: Sort imports in alphabetical order instead of line length

phpResolver.sortNatural.description: Sort imports using a 'natural order' algorithm

phpResolver.leadingSeparator.description: Expand class with leading namespace separator

phpResolver.highlightOnSave.description: Auto highlight not imported and not used when a file is saved

phpResolver.highlightOnOpen.description: Auto highlight not imported and not used when a file is opened

phpResolver.phpBeautifierCommand.description: Full path to the PHP beautifier command (phpcbf)

phpResolver.phpSnifferCommand.description: Full path to the PHP sniffer command (phpcs)

phpResolver.phpCsFixerCommand.description: Full path to the PHP fixer command (php-cs-fixer)

phpResolver.phpStandards.description: The standards to be used with the beautifier / sniffer. Comma separated.

phpResolver.phpCustomStandardsFile.description: The custom standards file to be used with the beautifier / sniffer.

phpResolver.fixerConfigString.default:
<?php

return (new PhpCsFixer\Config())
    ->setRules([
   '@PSR12' => false, 
   '@Symfony' => true, 
   'indentation_type' => true, 
   'array_indentation' => true, 
   'array_syntax' => [
         'syntax' => 'long' 
      ], 
   'combine_consecutive_unsets' => true, 
   'class_attributes_separation' => [
            'elements' => [
               'method' => 'one' 
            ] 
         ], 
   'multiline_whitespace_before_semicolons' => false, 
   'single_quote' => true, 
   'blank_line_after_opening_tag' => true, 
   'blank_line_before_statement' => true, 
   'braces' => [
                  'allow_single_line_closure' => true, 
                  'position_after_functions_and_oop_constructs' => 'same' 
               ], 
   'cast_spaces' => false, 
   'class_definition' => [
                     'single_line' => true 
                  ], 
   'concat_space' => [
                        'spacing' => 'one' 
                     ], 
   'declare_equal_normalize' => true, 
   'function_typehint_space' => true, 
   'single_line_comment_style' => [
                           'comment_types' => [
                              'hash' 
                           ] 
                        ], 
   'include' => true, 
   'lowercase_cast' => true, 
   'native_function_casing' => true, 
   'new_with_braces' => true, 
   'no_blank_lines_after_class_opening' => true, 
   'no_blank_lines_after_phpdoc' => true, 
   'no_blank_lines_before_namespace' => false, 
   'no_empty_comment' => true, 
   'no_empty_phpdoc' => true, 
   'no_empty_statement' => true, 
   'no_extra_blank_lines' => [
                                 'tokens' => [
                                    'curly_brace_block', 
                                    'extra', 
                                    'parenthesis_brace_block', 
                                    'square_brace_block', 
                                    'throw', 
                                    'use' 
                                 ] 
                              ], 
   'no_leading_import_slash' => true, 
   'no_leading_namespace_whitespace' => true, 
   'no_mixed_echo_print' => [
                                       'use' => 'echo' 
                                    ], 
   'no_multiline_whitespace_around_double_arrow' => true, 
   'no_short_bool_cast' => true, 
   'no_singleline_whitespace_before_semicolons' => true, 
   'no_spaces_around_offset' => true, 
   'no_trailing_comma_in_list_call' => true, 
   'no_trailing_comma_in_singleline_array' => true, 
   'no_unneeded_control_parentheses' => true, 
   'no_unused_imports' => true, 
   'no_whitespace_before_comma_in_array' => true, 
   'no_whitespace_in_blank_line' => true, 
   'normalize_index_brace' => true, 
   'object_operator_without_whitespace' => true, 
   'php_unit_fqcn_annotation' => true, 
   'phpdoc_align' => true, 
   'phpdoc_annotation_without_dot' => false, 
   'phpdoc_indent' => true, 
   'general_phpdoc_tag_rename' => true, 
   'phpdoc_no_access' => true, 
   'phpdoc_no_alias_tag' => true, 
   'phpdoc_no_empty_return' => false, 
   'phpdoc_no_package' => false, 
   'phpdoc_no_useless_inheritdoc' => true, 
   'phpdoc_return_self_reference' => true, 
   'phpdoc_scalar' => true, 
   'phpdoc_separation' => true, 
   'phpdoc_single_line_var_spacing' => true, 
   'phpdoc_summary' => true, 
   'phpdoc_to_comment' => true, 
   'phpdoc_trim' => true, 
   'phpdoc_types' => true, 
   'phpdoc_var_without_name' => true, 
   'increment_style' => true, 
   'return_type_declaration' => true, 
   'short_scalar_cast' => true, 
   'single_blank_line_before_namespace' => true, 
   'single_class_element_per_statement' => true, 
   'space_after_semicolon' => true, 
   'standardize_not_equals' => true, 
   'ternary_operator_spaces' => true, 
   'trailing_comma_in_multiline' => [
                                          'elements' => [
                                             'arrays' 
                                          ] 
                                       ], 
   'trim_array_spaces' => false, 
   'unary_operator_spaces' => false, 
   'whitespace_after_comma_in_array' => true, 
   'single_blank_line_at_eof' => false 
])
     ->setIndent('	')
    ->setLineEnding('
')
;

phpResolver.phpFixerRules.description: The rules to be used with the php-cs-fixer.

phpResolver.phpLogFile.description: The PHP error log file - global or for the project.

phpResolver.phpLogFilePathRemote.description: If your log comes from remote source, using this you can map remote file system to the local one.

phpResolver.phpLogFilePathLocal.description: If your log comes from remote source, using this you can map local file system to the remote one.

phpResolver.addProtocolToLog.description: Different versions of the vscode are acting differently on resolving files links. From here you can remove 'file://' protocol from the log file output

phpResolver.lineNumberSeparator.description: Different versions of the vscode are using different way to recognize line numbers in the links. From here you can change the separator (usually # or :)

phpResolver.errorLogTruncateSize.description: Automatically truncate error log file when it reaches the size (in megabytes). 0 means no truncation.

phpResolver.fileSizeOnHover.description: Show file size in Explorer window on hover

phpResolver.limitCodeLines.description: Set the file lines limit above which the PHP CS should not run checks

phpResolver.gap.description: If there should be a gap between the description and tags

phpResolver.returnGap.description: If there should be a gap between params and return

phpResolver.defaultType.description: Default type to use if a type wasn't able to be detected

phpResolver.returnVoid.description: Should we return void if there is no detectable return type?

phpResolver.extra.description: Extra tags you wish to include in every DocBlock

phpResolver.useShortNames.description: Whether you want to use int instead of integer and bool instead of boolean.

phpResolver.qualifyClassNames.description: Fully qualifies any data types used in param and returns by reading namespace use statements.

phpResolver.alignParams.description: Vertically aligns param types and names with additional spaces.

phpResolver.alignReturn.description: Vertically aligns return with above param statements.

phpResolver.varDescription.description: Include a description placeholder for @var tags

phpResolver.paramDescription.description: Include a description placeholder for @param tags

phpResolver.returnDescription.description: Include a description placeholder for @return tags

phpResolver.functionTemplate.description: Specify the default template for functions.

phpResolver.propertyTemplate.description: Specify the default template for class variables.

phpResolver.classTemplate.description: Specify the default template for classes.

phpResolver.enableDocblockModule.description: Enable or disable DocBlock/snippet module (requires window reload)
